# rotateRight(_:)

**Instance Method**

Rotates the selected image to the right.

## Declaration

```swift
@IBAction @MainActor func rotateRight(_ sender: Any!)
```

## Parameters

- **sender**: The object that sent the message.

## Discussion

This method is can be connected to a user interface item in Interface Builder.

## Selected Item Rotation

- **canRotateSelectedItemsLeft**: Returns whether the selected items can be rotated left.
- **canRotateSelectedItemsRight**: Returns whether the selected items can be rotated right.
- **rotateLeft(_:)**: Rotates the selected image to the left.

items.description: Returns whether the selected items can be rotated left.
items.name: canRotateSelectedItemsLeft

items.description: Returns whether the selected items can be rotated right.
items.name: canRotateSelectedItemsRight

items.description: Rotates the selected image to the left.
